# Arabinda Saha | Business Intelligence & Data Analyst

> Dashboards, trackers, education analytics, assessment analytics, and decision views for institutional teams in India.

Arabinda Saha is a Business Intelligence and Data Analyst working on internal dashboards, performance indicators, education analytics, assessment analytics, and decision-support views. His work connects data analysis with institutional operations, school-program context, and clear page/storytelling structure for selected projects.

## Best-fit opportunities
- Business Intelligence Analyst
- Data Analyst
- Business Data Analyst
- Reporting Analyst
- Operations Analyst
- Analytics Consultant
- Selected dashboard, portfolio page, and landing page projects in India

## Focus areas
- **Business intelligence and decision systems**: Power BI, Excel, Google Sheets, KPI tracking, dashboard design, management views, and decision views.
- **Data analysis**: Python, Pandas, Plotly, SQL, data cleaning, and data validation.
- **Institutional workflows**: performance tracking, stakeholder communication, documentation workflows, governance-linked workflows, and decision-support systems.
- **Education analytics**: assessment analytics, learning-gap analysis, Bloom's taxonomy, LOTS-HOTS, LMS workflows, and school program dashboards.
- **Selected page work**: portfolio pages, landing pages, proof-led storytelling, information structure, and design/build support for founders, consultants, and small teams.

## Experience
- **Data Consultant @ Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan** (Feb 2026 - Present): Anonymized summary of internal dashboard views, performance indicators, matter/case performance, revenue indicators, lawyer-level performance indicators, leadership review, and decision-support logic. Internal firm data and dashboard details are not exposed.
- **Program Head - School Programs @ Edudigm** (Dec 2023 - Jan 2026): Led program delivery and coordination across 5+ partner schools, covering 1,500+ students and 60+ teachers. Built Competitive Edge across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools. Scaled Stellar Space Quiz to 600+ schools across 6 states.
- **Subject Matter Expert - Mathematics @ Edudigm** (Jun 2022 - Nov 2023): Delivered Mathematics content for Classes 9-12 and contributed to curriculum and assessment systems later used in school-program delivery.

## Selected work
- **Competitive Edge - Diagnostic Assessment Analytics**: Assessment analytics framework using Bloom's taxonomy and LOTS-HOTS, scaled across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools.
- **LKS Dashboard & Performance Analytics**: Anonymized internal dashboard and decision-view work covering performance, revenue indicators, matter/case tracking, and leadership review.
- **Career Assessment Tool**: Career assessment workflow piloted with 500+ students from Classes 9-12 at KV Kharagpur.
- **Stellar Space Quiz**: ISRO merchandise-partnered National Space Day quiz reaching 600+ schools across 6 states.
- **School Program Command Centre - Active Prototype**: Dashboard-led product lab prototype using synthetic/sample data. Not yet piloted.
- **Reflections and Parichay**: Product lab work around storytelling interfaces, identity pages, and clear page composition.
